summary.description:
Today, cooler for the inside temperature (down 1.6°C) and drier conditions in outside humidity (down 10%).

The past week and month had observable variation in the amount of wind (up 19 miles), light levels (up 3007 lux), and cloud levels (down 103 m) when compared to today.

summary.summary: Inside; comfortable and pleasant temperatures. Outside; like a nice, warm day. Also, neither too dry nor too humid and some wind, breezy at times. Showers, clouds will occasionally block sunlight, and periods of sunshine are expected. No significant shifts in the weather are expected.
